summary: Send Health Report feature and Personal Intelligence editing tested. Backend: 12/12 API tests pass. Frontend: Account Health overview page, detail page, and Send Report modal all working correctly. Email sending returns expected 'domain not verified' error in preview env (Resend domain not configured).
critical_code_review_comments: account_health.py: Well-structured endpoints with proper error handling and HTML generation for email reports
account_health.py lines 518-580: send_user_health_report correctly validates user, aggregates metrics, builds HTML, and sends via Resend
account_health.py lines 583-688: send_org_health_report properly aggregates org-level metrics with team member breakdown
account_health.py lines 344-508: _build_report_html generates comprehensive HTML email with metrics, touchpoint breakdown, recent activity
account-health.tsx: Overview page properly loads accounts, displays summary cards, search, filters, and period toggles
account-health/[id].tsx: Detail page shows health score banner, key metrics grid, touchpoint breakdown, recent activity, account info
Both frontend files have Send Report modal with proper form fields (email pre-filled, name, note) and API integration
PersonalIntelSection.tsx: Edit/Save/Cancel flow working correctly - verified in previous iteration 192
seed_data_creation: Used existing users and contacts. Test data from previous iterations preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Send Health Report feature fully implemented. Backend endpoints POST /api/account-health/user/{user_id}/send-report and POST /api/account-health/org/{org_id}/send-report accept email, name, note, period parameters. In preview environment, email sending returns 500 with 'domain not verified' error from Resend - this is expected. Frontend has working modals with pre-filled email, Cancel/Send buttons. Personal Intelligence editing feature also working (Edit/Save/Cancel buttons functional).

features_verified.backend_account_health_overview: PASS - Returns list of accounts with health scores, metrics, login recency
features_verified.backend_user_health_detail: PASS - Returns detailed metrics, event breakdown, recent events
features_verified.backend_send_user_report_endpoint: PASS - Accepts payload, validates user, returns domain error (expected in preview)
features_verified.backend_send_user_report_validation: PASS - Returns 422 for missing email, 404 for non-existent user
features_verified.backend_org_health_detail: PASS - Returns org aggregate metrics with user breakdown
features_verified.backend_send_org_report_endpoint: PASS - Accepts payload, validates org, returns domain error (expected)
features_verified.frontend_account_health_overview: PASS - Shows summary cards (Healthy/At Risk/Critical), search, filters, period toggles, account list
features_verified.frontend_account_health_detail: PASS - Shows health banner, key metrics grid, touchpoint breakdown, recent activity, account info
features_verified.frontend_send_report_button: PASS - Visible in header with paper-plane icon
features_verified.frontend_send_report_modal: PASS - Opens with pre-filled email/name, note textarea, Cancel/Send buttons
features_verified.frontend_quick_send_icons: PASS - Paper-plane icons visible on each account row in overview
features_verified.frontend_personal_intel_section: PASS - Shows existing data with Edit button

mocked_apis.Resend Email: MOCKED - Domain send.imonsocial.com not verified in preview environment. Email sending returns 500 error.
